Similar arid environments and concrete block construction are found in northern Chile, though the specific white-painted wall base is more iconic to Peruvian residential patterns.

While the general road layout and concrete work are seen in Mexico, the specific combination of infrastructure and the hyper-arid landscape described by the council is less typical than the Andean coastal candidates.
